bottom_line: Integration tests in S04 caught a real S03 implementation bug (composite-PK SQLAlchemy misuse) that unit tests missed — reinforcing that integration tests should run as early as possible; a redundant QV gate double-run pattern also needs investigation to avoid wasting ~1-3 min per item.
coverage_notes: Read S01-S08 and S13 logs in full (all < 2 KB except S13 at 439 KB). Sampled tail (last 50 lines) of S12 run1 and run2 logs — both passed identically. Sampled tail (last 50 lines) of S13 run3 log — passed with 3216 tests; one unraisable-exception warning (KeyError: '__import__' in pytest lambda, not a test failure). DB telemetry: full (DB:UP confirmed). All 13 QV gate and step reports read from ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/.

findings.title: Integration tests caught composite-PK SQLAlchemy bug that unit tests missed
findings.recommendation: Add a targeted unit test in tests/unit/test_fix_cycle.py that exercises _try_auto_amend_after_escalation with a composite-PK WorkItem (project_id + id) to prevent regression. Alternatively, add a fixture helper that raises if db.get() is called with a single key against a known composite-PK model.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/CR-00087_S04_TestsImpl_report.md:14-17 — 'db.get(WorkItem, step.work_item_id) called with single key against composite-PK model → InvalidRequestError'
ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/CR-00087_S04_TestsImpl_report.md — RED evidence: FixStatus.in_progress instead of FixStatus.escalated; caught by integration test
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add a targeted unit test for _try_auto_amend_after_escalation covering composite-PK WorkItem to prevent regression of the db.get() single-key bug caught by CR-00087 S04 integration tests; analyzed in ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/CR-00087_self_assess_report.md. Target file: tests/unit/test_fix_cycle.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: TDD stub tests went stale after S03 wired the real implementation
findings.recommendation: Add a convention (and linter rule) that TDD stub tests containing NotImplementedError must include a marker comment and auto-delete after the real implementation lands. Alternatively, move stubs to a separate file that gets deleted in the same step that wires the implementation.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00087_S05_fix1.log — stale stub tests in tests/unit/test_fix_cycle.py:674-728 raising NotImplementedError after S03 wired the real function
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add linter rule to flag NotImplementedError stubs that have a sibling test exercising the same real function without patching; analyzed in CR-00087 (ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/CR-00087_self_assess_report.md). Target: scripts/check_templates.py or new lint script. Effort: S.

findings.title: QV gates S09-S11 each ran twice (identical results, both passed)
findings.recommendation: Investigate why the executor re-runs QV gate commands when they already pass on the first attempt. Check step_commands.py and executor/ for redundant retry logic. The most likely cause is a timing issue where the executor marks a step 'in progress' before the gate finishes, triggering an immediate re-invocation.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00087_S09_run1.log and ai-dev/logs/CR-00087_S09_run2.log — identical output, both exit 0
ai-dev/logs/CR-00087_S10_run1.log and ai-dev/logs/CR-00087_S10_run2.log — identical, both exit 0
ai-dev/logs/CR-00087_S11_run1.log and ai-dev/logs/CR-00087_S11_run2.log — identical, both exit 0
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Investigate and fix redundant QV gate double-run in executor/step_commands.py; analyzed in CR-00087 (ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/CR-00087_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/cli/step_commands.py, executor/. Effort: M.

findings.title: S04 integration test fixture had no HEAD, causing _captured_paths to return empty
findings.recommendation: Add a git HEAD smoke test to _write_worktree_with_git and all sibling worktree fixture helpers: assert git rev-parse HEAD succeeds before the test body runs. This prevents silent pass-when-nothing-is-tested failures.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/CR-00087_S04_TestsImpl_report.md — '_write_worktree_with_git staged but never committed pre-cycle files → worktree had no HEAD → _captured_paths returned ∅ → violations never detected'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add git HEAD smoke assertion to _write_worktree_with_git and sibling worktree fixtures; analyzed in CR-00087 (ai-dev/active/CR-00087/reports/CR-00087_self_assess_report.md). Target: tests/integration/conftest.py or tests/integration/test_scope_amend_endpoints.py. Effort: S.
